name: Timur Mutsurayev
description: '''Timur Khamzatovich Mutsurayev''' ({{langx|ce|Муцурай ХӀамзат-кӀант Темур}}; {{langx|ru|Тимур Хамзатович Муцураев}}; born 25 July 1976), also spelled '''Mucuraev''' or '''Mutsuraev''', is a [[Chechen people|Chechen]] singer-songwriter or [[Bard (Soviet Union)|bard]] who sang in [[Russian language|Russian]] and, rarely, in [[Chechen language|Chechen]]. A majority of his songs are about the [[Chechen–Russian conflict|conflict in Chechnya.]]
